title: Investigating user reports of issues with various Microsoft 365 services
impact: Users reported issues with Microsoft 365 services.

updates.content:
Title: Investigating user reports of issues with various Microsoft 365 services

User impact: We don't have detail on impact yet. We're seeing an increase in user reported issues above our alerting threshold.

More info: At this time, we are not seeing any issues within the Microsoft 365 suite of services. While the overall volume has exceeded our alerting threshold, we have not yet identified any specific impact.
 
Current status: We are reviewing service telemetry and available information to determine if there is an issue happening and we'll update this message shortly with our latest findings. An initial review of the telemetry is showing that the Microsoft-managed environment is operating as expected.

This communication serves as a preliminary notification about a potential issue affecting your service.

Title: Investigating user reports of issues with various Microsoft 365 services

User impact: We don't have detail on impact yet. We're seeing an increase in user reported issues above our alerting threshold.

More info: At this time, we are not seeing any issues within the Microsoft 365 suite of services. While the overall volume has exceeded our alerting threshold, we have not yet identified any specific impact.

Current status: Our telemetry shows that the Microsoft-managed environment remains in a healthy state, however, we've observed reports of similar outages across other services leveraging third-party services. We'll continue to evaluate these reports as we work to better understand the impact to our customers.

Start time: Monday, June 22, 2026, at 1:09 PM UTC

Next update by: Monday, June 22, 2026, at 4:00 PM UTC

Title: Investigating user reports of issues with various Microsoft 365 services

User impact: Users reported issues with Microsoft 365 services.

Final status: We've monitored our telemetry and confirmed the Microsoft-managed environment remains in a healthy state. We're aware of third-party outages affecting multiple online services inside and outside of the Microsoft ecosystem which may have contributed to impact.

The Microsoft-managed environment is functioning as expected and a service incident didn’t occur. This communication will expire in 72 hours.

This is the final update for the event.
